title: Report-only local live mini-run chain
problem: Tickets 060-064 proved individual report-only live structured probes. Operators lack a single command that runs the local research spine end-to-end and writes one auditable report without DB, export, or cloud surfaces.
acceptance_criteria: Live run on default fixture: stages 1-3 each accepted_count >= 1.
Stage 4 accepted_count >= 1 via default hybrid overlay mode.
One report under data/reports/live_probes/; db_writes remains false.
strict-chain records skipped contradiction when chain inputs insufficient.
Mock/default pytest and CI remain green without Ollama.
Mini-run does not call ticket drafting or queue promotion APIs.
test_plan: Manual live: probe-mini-run and probe-mini-run --strict-chain with ollama opt-in
non_goals: Do not persist claims, relationships, or contradiction evidence to default DB or public exports.
Do not add OpenAI/OpenRouter or API keys.
Do not let Qwen author or promote implementation tickets.
Pure chained contradiction as default acceptance gate.
rollback_plan: Revert CLI, mini-run orchestrator, tests, and docs. No schema migrations.
